name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool target, language, or capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement

---

**What you want**
A clear description of the feature.

**For a new tool target, please include**
- Tool name:
- File path it reads (e.g. `.mytool/rules.md`):
- Format (full reference doc vs. short editor rules):
- Link to docs:

**Why it helps**
The problem this solves.
